title: Mannenna Vepenna Song Lyrics Enakku Vaaitha Adimaigal

Mannenna Vepenna Song Lyrics From #EnakkuVaaithaAdimaigal
#friendshipfailuresong #EVATrollsong

Naatla irukkalaam

thalaya thalaya aattuvaan

seo.title: Mannenna Vepenna Song Lyrics Enakku Vaaitha Adimaigal
seo.description: Full Mannenna Vepenna songs lyrics, Enakku Vaaitha Adimaigal Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Comedy Bazar Maran, Music: Santhosh Dayanidhi, Singer(s): Dolak Jagan, Mukesh.
seo.keywords: Comedy Bazar Maran, Enakku Vaaitha Adimaigal, Santhosh Dayanidhi, Dolak Jagan, Mukesh, Mannenna Vepenna full lyrics, Enakku Vaaitha Adimaigal songs lyrics, Mannenna Vepenna lyrics snippets, Mannenna Vepenna WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Mannenna Vepenna lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mannenna Vepenna'?

The song humorously explores themes of friendship failures and the quirks of social interactions.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Enakku Vaaitha Adimaigal, the song reflects the comedic situations faced by the characters regarding their friendships.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Dolak Jagan and Mukesh.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Mannenna Vepenna' was composed by Santhosh Dayanidhi.

When was this song released?

'Mannenna Vepenna' was released on December 20, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Mannenna Vepenna' from the movie Enakku Vaaitha Adimaigal is a lighthearted take on the ups and downs of friendships. With its catchy tune and humorous lyrics, it evokes a sense of joy and laughter, making it perfect for party settings. The collaboration between Dolak Jagan and Mukesh adds a vibrant energy to the track, ensuring it resonates with listeners. Overall, the song conveys the playful side of social dynamics, leaving audiences entertained and amused.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mannenna Vepenna from Enakku Vaaitha Adimaigal is a delightful blend of humor and melody, showcasing the unique collaboration between the vibrant voices of Dolak Jagan and Mukesh. This song captures the essence of friendship failures with a lighthearted twist, making it a perfect addition to any celebration. Get ready to groove to the catchy beats and witty lyrics that will leave you smiling!
stanzaMeanings: In this world, we can have many friends, but this one friend is not dependable, not suitable, not trustworthy, just a small friend among many.
What should I do? What can I say? This person is just a burden to me.
This person is making a fuss, acting like a big deal, but is just a nuisance.
He roams around the village, but when it comes to numbers, he is a fraud. If your heart gets hurt, just run away.
He will dance around, showing off like in a movie, but when the time comes, he will just be a useless vehicle.
He will mess up everything, and I will end up getting into trouble because of him.
He will mess up everything, and I will end up getting into trouble because of him.
What should I do? What can I say? This person is just a burden to me.
This person is making a fuss, acting like a big deal, but is just a nuisance.
He roams around the village, but when it comes to numbers, he is a fraud. If your heart gets hurt, just run away.
He is not a human, just a fake. He will deceive you and will not change for me either.
When girls talk, he won't leave until the police come to take him away.
He will give us torture and ruin our future, making it difficult for us.
He will give us trouble and only eat the leftovers, leaving us with nothing.
He will mess up everything, and I will end up getting into trouble because of him.
He will mess up everything, and I will end up getting into trouble because of him.
What should I do? What can I say? This person is just a burden to me.
I am worried about my situation, I am stuck in a bad place, and I am feeling trapped.
We are stuck in a train, and he is ruining our friendship by causing trouble.
He shows off his eyes and acts like a big deal, but he is just a nuisance.
I don't want your kiss. My friend will give me trouble instead.
He will mess up everything, and I will end up getting into trouble because of him.
He will mess up everything, and I will end up getting into trouble because of him.
This is a global performance, my friend.
What do you want? We will talk about your friendship later.
I will say something new and make a scene, putting this act on display and ruining everything for him.
He will mess up everything, and I will end up getting into trouble because of him.
He will mess up everything, and I will end up getting into trouble because of him.
When the time comes, he won't let the next person go without trouble....
